page_metadata.biotools__summary: LICHEM is a software package that can interface with Gaussian, PSI4, NWChem, TINKER, and TINKER–HP to enable QM/MM calculations using multipolar/polarizable force fields.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LICHEM is a software package that can interface with Gaussian, PSI4, NWChem, TINKER, and TINKER–HP to enable QM/MM calculations using multipolar/polarizable force fields.
